contents: Require Import Types.Paths Types.Sigma Types.Prod HFiber Limits.Pullback.
Context {X Y : Type} (Q : X -> Y -> Type).

Definition SPushout := @Pushout@{up _ _ up} (sig@{up _} (fun (xy : X * Y) => Q (fst xy) (snd xy))) X Y
                                  (fst o pr1) (snd o pr1).

Definition spglue {x:X} {y:Y} : Q x y -> spushl x = spushr y
    := fun q => pglue ((x,y) ; q).

Definition spushout_rec (R : Type)
             (spushl' : X -> R) (spushr' : Y -> R)
             (spglue' : forall x y (q : Q x y), spushl' x = spushr' y)
    : SPushout -> R.

goals.conclusion: SPushout -> R

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> spushl' x = spushr' y

goals.conclusion: SPushout -> R

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> spushl' x = spushr' y

contents:
srapply (@Pushout_rec {xy:X * Y & Q (fst xy) (snd xy)} X Y
                          (fst o pr1) (snd o pr1) R spushl' spushr').

goals.conclusion:
forall a : {xy : X * Y & Q (fst xy) (snd xy)},
spushl' ((fst o pr1) a) = spushr' ((snd o pr1) a)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> spushl' x = spushr' y

goals.conclusion: spushl' x = spushr' y

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> spushl' x0 = spushr' y0

contents:
Definition spushout_rec_beta_spglue (R : Type)
             (spushl' : X -> R) (spushr' : Y -> R)
             (spglue' : forall x y (q : Q x y), spushl' x = spushr' y)
             (x:X) (y:Y) (q:Q x y)
    : ap (spushout_rec R spushl' spushr' spglue') (spglue q) = spglue' x y q
    := Pushout_rec_beta_pglue _ _ _ _ ((x, y); q).

Definition spushout_ind (R : SPushout -> Type)
             (spushl' : forall x, R (spushl x))
             (spushr' : forall y, R (spushr y))
             (spglue' : forall x y (q : Q x y), 
                 transport R (spglue q) (spushl' x) = (spushr' y))
    : forall p, R p.

goals.conclusion: forall p : SPushout, R p

hypotheses.type:
forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
transport R (spglue q) (spushl' x) = spushr' y

goals.conclusion: forall p : SPushout, R p

hypotheses.type:
forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
transport R (spglue q) (spushl' x) = spushr' y

contents:
srapply (@Pushout_ind {xy:X * Y & Q (fst xy) (snd xy)} X Y
                          (fst o pr1) (snd o pr1) R spushl' spushr').

goals.conclusion:
forall a : {xy : X * Y & Q (fst xy) (snd xy)},
transport R (pglue a) (spushl' ((fst o pr1) a)) = spushr' ((snd o pr1) a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
transport R (spglue q) (spushl' x) = spushr' y

goals.conclusion: transport R (pglue ((x, y); q)) (spushl' x) = spushr' y

hypotheses.type:
forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) (q0 : Q x0 y0),
transport R (spglue q0) (spushl' x0) = spushr' y0

contents:
Definition spushout_ind_beta_spglue (R : SPushout -> Type)
             (spushl' : forall x, R (spushl x))
             (spushr' : forall y, R (spushr y))
             (spglue' : forall x y (q : Q x y), 
                 transport R (spglue q) (spushl' x) = (spushr' y))
             (x:X) (y:Y) (q:Q x y)
    : apD (spushout_ind R spushl' spushr' spglue') (spglue q) = spglue'  x y q
    := Pushout_ind_beta_pglue _ _ _ _ ((x,y);q).

goals.conclusion: SPushout Q -> SPushout Q'

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (g y)

goals.conclusion: SPushout Q -> SPushout Q'

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (g y)

goals.conclusion: X -> SPushout Q'

goals.conclusion: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> ?spushl' x = ?spushr' y

Q x y ->
(fun x0 : X => spushl Q' (f x0)) x = (fun y0 : Y => spushr Q' (g y0)) y

goals.conclusion: (fun x0 : X => spushl Q' (f x0)) x = (fun y0 : Y => spushr Q' (g y0)) y

contents:
Definition functor_spushout_compose {X Y X' Y' X'' Y'' : Type}
  {Q : X -> Y -> Type} {Q' : X' -> Y' -> Type} {Q'' : X'' -> Y'' -> Type}
  (f : X -> X') (g : Y -> Y') (f' : X' -> X'') (g' : Y' -> Y'')
  (h : forall x y, Q x y -> Q' (f x) (g y))
  (h' : forall x y, Q' x y -> Q'' (f' x) (g' y))
  : functor_spushout f' g' h' o functor_spushout f g h
    == functor_spushout (f' o f) (g' o g) (fun x y => h' _ _ o h x y).

goals.conclusion:
functor_spushout f' g' h' o functor_spushout f g h ==
functor_spushout (f' o f) (g' o g)
  (fun (x : X) (y : Y) => h' (f x) (g y) o h x y)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (g y)
forall (x : X') (y : Y'), Q' x y -> Q'' (f' x) (g' y)

goals.conclusion:
functor_spushout f' g' h' o functor_spushout f g h ==
functor_spushout (f' o f) (g' o g)
  (fun (x : X) (y : Y) => h' (f x) (g y) o h x y)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (g y)
forall (x : X') (y : Y'), Q' x y -> Q'' (f' x) (g' y)

goals.conclusion:
forall x : X,
(fun p : SPushout Q =>
 (functor_spushout f' g' h' o functor_spushout f g h) p =
 functor_spushout (f' o f) (g' o g)
   (fun (x0 : X) (y : Y) => h' (f x0) (g y) o h x0 y) p)
  (spushl Q x)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (g y)
forall (x : X') (y : Y'), Q' x y -> Q'' (f' x) (g' y)

goals.conclusion:
forall y : Y,
(fun p : SPushout Q =>
 (functor_spushout f' g' h' o functor_spushout f g h) p =
 functor_spushout (f' o f) (g' o g)
   (fun (x : X) (y0 : Y) => h' (f x) (g y0) o h x y0) p)
  (spushr Q y)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (g y)
forall (x : X') (y : Y'), Q' x y -> Q'' (f' x) (g' y)

goals.conclusion:
forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
transport
  (fun p : SPushout Q =>
   (functor_spushout f' g' h' o functor_spushout f g h) p =
   functor_spushout (f' o f) (g' o g)
     (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) => h' (f x0) (g y0) o h x0 y0) p)
  (spglue Q q) (?spushl' x) =
?spushr' y

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (g y)
forall (x : X') (y : Y'), Q' x y -> Q'' (f' x) (g' y)

goals.conclusion:
forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
transport
  (fun p : SPushout Q =>
   (functor_spushout f' g' h' o functor_spushout f g h) p =
   functor_spushout (f' o f) (g' o g)
     (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) => h' (f x0) (g y0) o h x0 y0) p)
  (spglue Q q) ((fun x0 : X => 1) x) =
(fun y0 : Y => 1) y

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (g y)
forall (x : X') (y : Y'), Q' x y -> Q'' (f' x) (g' y)

contents: intros x y q; cbn beta.

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (fun p : SPushout Q =>
   functor_spushout f' g' h' (functor_spushout f g h p) =
   functor_spushout (fun x0 : X => f' (f x0)) (fun x0 : Y => g' (g x0))
     (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) (x1 : Q x0 y0) => h' (f x0) (g y0) (h x0 y0 x1))
     p)
  (spglue Q q) 1 =
1

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (f x0) (g y0)
forall (x0 : X') (y0 : Y'), Q' x0 y0 -> Q'' (f' x0) (g' y0)

goals.conclusion:
ap (functor_spushout f' g' h') (ap (functor_spushout f g h) (spglue Q q)) @ 1 =
1 @
ap
  (functor_spushout (fun x0 : X => f' (f x0)) (fun x0 : Y => g' (g x0))
     (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) (x1 : Q x0 y0) => h' (f x0) (g y0) (h x0 y0 x1)))
  (spglue Q q)

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (f x0) (g y0)
forall (x0 : X') (y0 : Y'), Q' x0 y0 -> Q'' (f' x0) (g' y0)

goals.conclusion:
ap (functor_spushout f' g' h') (ap (functor_spushout f g h) (spglue Q q)) =
ap
  (functor_spushout (fun x0 : X => f' (f x0)) (fun x0 : Y => g' (g x0))
     (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) (x1 : Q x0 y0) => h' (f x0) (g y0) (h x0 y0 x1)))
  (spglue Q q)

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (f x0) (g y0)
forall (x0 : X') (y0 : Y'), Q' x0 y0 -> Q'' (f' x0) (g' y0)

goals.conclusion: ap (functor_spushout f g h) (spglue Q q) = ?Goal

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (f x0) (g y0)
forall (x0 : X') (y0 : Y'), Q' x0 y0 -> Q'' (f' x0) (g' y0)

goals.conclusion:
ap (functor_spushout f' g' h') ?Goal =
ap
  (functor_spushout (fun x0 : X => f' (f x0)) (fun x0 : Y => g' (g x0))
     (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) (x1 : Q x0 y0) => h' (f x0) (g y0) (h x0 y0 x1)))
  (spglue Q q)

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (f x0) (g y0)
forall (x0 : X') (y0 : Y'), Q' x0 y0 -> Q'' (f' x0) (g' y0)

goals.conclusion:
ap (functor_spushout f' g' h') (spglue Q' (h x y q)) =
ap
  (functor_spushout (fun x0 : X => f' (f x0)) (fun x0 : Y => g' (g x0))
     (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) (x1 : Q x0 y0) => h' (f x0) (g y0) (h x0 y0 x1)))
  (spglue Q q)

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (f x0) (g y0)
forall (x0 : X') (y0 : Y'), Q' x0 y0 -> Q'' (f' x0) (g' y0)

goals.conclusion:
spglue Q'' (h' (f x) (g y) (h x y q)) =
ap
  (functor_spushout (fun x0 : X => f' (f x0)) (fun x0 : Y => g' (g x0))
     (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) (x1 : Q x0 y0) => h' (f x0) (g y0) (h x0 y0 x1)))
  (spglue Q q)

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (f x0) (g y0)
forall (x0 : X') (y0 : Y'), Q' x0 y0 -> Q'' (f' x0) (g' y0)

goals.conclusion:
ap
  (functor_spushout (fun x0 : X => f' (f x0)) (fun x0 : Y => g' (g x0))
     (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) (x1 : Q x0 y0) => h' (f x0) (g y0) (h x0 y0 x1)))
  (spglue Q q) =
spglue Q'' (h' (f x) (g y) (h x y q))

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (f x0) (g y0)
forall (x0 : X') (y0 : Y'), Q' x0 y0 -> Q'' (f' x0) (g' y0)

contents:
Definition functor_spushout_idmap {X Y : Type} {Q : X -> Y -> Type}
  : functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun x y (q : Q x y) => q) == idmap.

goals.conclusion: functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun (x : X) (y : Y) => idmap) == idmap
functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun (x : X) (y : Y) => idmap) == idmap

forall x : X,
(fun p : SPushout Q =>
 functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun (x0 : X) (y : Y) => idmap) p = idmap p)
  (spushl Q x)

forall y : Y,
(fun p : SPushout Q =>
 functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun (x : X) (y0 : Y) => idmap) p = idmap p)
  (spushr Q y)

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
transport
  (fun p : SPushout Q =>
   functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) => idmap) p = idmap p)
  (spglue Q q) (?spushl' x) =
?spushr' y

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
transport
  (fun p : SPushout Q =>
   functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) => idmap) p = idmap p)
  (spglue Q q) ((fun x0 : X => 1) x) =
(fun y0 : Y => 1) y

transport
  (fun p : SPushout Q =>
   functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) => idmap) p = p)
  (spglue Q q) 1 =
1

ap (functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) => idmap))
  (spglue Q q) @
1 = 1 @ spglue Q q

ap (functor_spushout idmap idmap (fun (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) => idmap))
  (spglue Q q) =
spglue Q q

contents:
Definition functor_spushout_homotopic {X Y Z W : Type}
  {Q : X -> Y -> Type} {Q' : Z -> W -> Type}
  {f g : X -> Z} (h : f == g)
  {i j : Y -> W} (k : i == j)
  (l : forall x y, Q x y -> Q' (f x) (i y))
  (m : forall x y, Q x y -> Q' (g x) (j y))
  (H : forall x y q,
    spglue Q' (l x y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y)
      = ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y q))
  : functor_spushout f i l == functor_spushout g j m.

goals.conclusion: functor_spushout f i l == functor_spushout g j m

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (i y)
forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (g x) (j y)

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
spglue Q' (l x y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y q)

goals.conclusion: functor_spushout f i l == functor_spushout g j m

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (i y)
forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (g x) (j y)

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
spglue Q' (l x y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y q)

goals.conclusion:
forall x : X,
(fun p : SPushout Q => functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p)
  (spushl Q x)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (i y)
forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (g x) (j y)

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
spglue Q' (l x y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y q)

goals.conclusion:
forall y : Y,
(fun p : SPushout Q => functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p)
  (spushr Q y)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (i y)
forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (g x) (j y)

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
spglue Q' (l x y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y q)

goals.conclusion:
forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
transport
  (fun p : SPushout Q => functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p)
  (spglue Q q) (?spushl' x) =
?spushr' y

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (i y)
forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (g x) (j y)

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
spglue Q' (l x y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y q)

goals.conclusion:
forall x : X,
(fun p : SPushout Q => functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p)
  (spushl Q x)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (i y)
forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (g x) (j y)

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
spglue Q' (l x y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y q)

goals.conclusion: functor_spushout f i l (spushl Q x) = functor_spushout g j m (spushl Q x)

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y : Y), Q x0 y -> Q' (f x0) (i y)
forall (x0 : X) (y : Y), Q x0 y -> Q' (g x0) (j y)

forall (x0 : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x0 y),
spglue Q' (l x0 y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x0) @ spglue Q' (m x0 y q)

goals.conclusion:
forall y : Y,
(fun p : SPushout Q => functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p)
  (spushr Q y)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (i y)
forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (g x) (j y)

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
spglue Q' (l x y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y q)

goals.conclusion: functor_spushout f i l (spushr Q y) = functor_spushout g j m (spushr Q y)

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y0 : Y), Q x y0 -> Q' (f x) (i y0)
forall (x : X) (y0 : Y), Q x y0 -> Q' (g x) (j y0)

forall (x : X) (y0 : Y) (q : Q x y0),
spglue Q' (l x y0 q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y0) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y0 q)

goals.conclusion:
forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
transport
  (fun p : SPushout Q => functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p)
  (spglue Q q)
  ((fun x0 : X =>
    ap (spushl Q') (h x0)
    :
    (fun p : SPushout Q =>
     functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p) 
      (spushl Q x0))
     x) =
(fun y0 : Y =>
 ap (spushr Q') (k y0)
 :
 (fun p : SPushout Q => functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p)
   (spushr Q y0))
  y

hypotheses.type: forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (f x) (i y)
forall (x : X) (y : Y), Q x y -> Q' (g x) (j y)

forall (x : X) (y : Y) (q : Q x y),
spglue Q' (l x y q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ spglue Q' (m x y q)

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (fun p : SPushout Q => functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p)
  (spglue Q q)
  ((fun x0 : X =>
    ap (spushl Q') (h x0)
    :
    (fun p : SPushout Q =>
     functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p) 
      (spushl Q x0))
     x) =
(fun y0 : Y =>
 ap (spushr Q') (k y0)
 :
 (fun p : SPushout Q => functor_spushout f i l p = functor_spushout g j m p)
   (spushr Q y0))
  y

hypotheses.type: forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (f x0) (i y0)
forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y), Q x0 y0 -> Q' (g x0) (j y0)

forall (x0 : X) (y0 : Y) (q0 : Q x0 y0),
spglue Q' (l x0 y0 q0) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y0) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x0) @ spglue Q' (m x0 y0 q0)

goals.conclusion:
ap (functor_spushout f i l) (spglue Q q) @ ap (spushr Q') (k y) =
ap (spushl Q') (h x) @ ap (functor_spushout g j m) (spglue Q q)

ap (spushl Q') (h x0) @ spglue Q' (m x0 y0 q0)

goals.conclusion: ap (functor_spushout f i l) (spglue Q q) = ?Goal

contents: (** Any pushout is equivalent to a span pushout. *)

Definition equiv_pushout_spushout {X Y Z : Type} (f : X -> Y) (g : X -> Z)
  : Pushout f g
    <~> SPushout (fun (y : Y) (z : Z) => {x : X & f x = y /\ g x = z}).

goals.conclusion:
Pushout f g <~>
SPushout (fun (y : Y) (z : Z) => {x : X & (f x = y) * (g x = z)})

Pushout f g <~>
SPushout (fun (y : Y) (z : Z) => {x : X & (f x = y) * (g x = z)})
Y <~> Y
Z <~> Z

?eB o f ==
(fun
   x : {xy : Y * Z &
       (fun (y : Y) (z : Z) => {x : X & (f x = y) * (g x = z)}) 
         (fst xy) (snd xy)} =>
 fst x.1)
o ?eA

?eC o g ==
(fun
   x : {xy : Y * Z &
       (fun (y : Y) (z : Z) => {x : X & (f x = y) * (g x = z)}) 
         (fst xy) (snd xy)} =>
 snd x.1)
o ?eA
X <~> {a : Y & {b : Z & {x : X & (f x = fst (a, b)) * (g x = snd (a, b))}}}
Y <~> Y
Z <~> Z

?eB o f ==
(fun
   x : {xy : Y * Z &
       (fun (y : Y) (z : Z) => {x : X & (f x = y) * (g x = z)}) 
         (fst xy) (snd xy)} =>
 fst x.1)
o (equiv_sigma_prod
     (fun xy : Y * Z =>
      (fun (y : Y) (z : Z) => {x : X & (f x = y) * (g x = z)}) 
        (fst xy) (snd xy))
   oE equiv_double_fibration_replacement f g)

?eC o g ==
(fun
   x : {xy : Y * Z &
       (fun (y : Y) (z : Z) => {x : X & (f x = y) * (g x = z)}) 
         (fst xy) (snd xy)} =>
 snd x.1)
o (equiv_sigma_prod
     (fun xy : Y * Z =>
      (fun (y : Y) (z : Z) => {x : X & (f x = y) * (g x = z)}) 
        (fst xy) (snd xy))
   oE equiv_double_fibration_replacement f g)

contents: (** There is a natural map from the total space of [Q] to the pushout product of [Q]. *)

Definition spushout_sjoin_map {X Y : Type} (Q : X -> Y -> Type)
  : {x : X & {y : Y & Q x y}} -> Pullback (spushl Q) (spushr Q)
  := functor_sigma idmap (fun _ => functor_sigma idmap (fun _ => spglue Q)).
